query: Can you identify the 850 nearest stars to us with a high metallicity?

execution.adql: SELECT TOP 850 parallax, source_id, ra, dec, phot_g_mean_mag, mh_gspphot, bp_rp, pmra, pmdec FROM gaiadr3.gaia_source WHERE MOD(random_index, 10000) = 0 AND parallax > 1 AND mh_gspphot >= 0.5 ORDER BY parallax DESC
